title: initial_conditions.json — starting volumes and actuator states
description: Initial state applied at plant build. plant_validator.gd additionally enforces: every unit_id/actuator_id resolves to the topology, and initial volume <= maximum_volume_m3.

$schema.description: Editor hint; ignored by the engine.

unit_states.description: Per-unit starting state (service flag, stored volume).

in_service.description: Whether the unit participates in the simulation at t=0.

volume_m3.description: Starting stored volume [m3]. StorageUnit only; must not exceed maximum_volume_m3 (runtime cross-check).

actuator_states.description: Per-valve starting positions and control mode.

is_manual.description: True when the valve starts under manual control.
